metadata.description: A marketplace of plugins for Claude Code, featuring tools for code management, creative writing, workplace productivity, and more.

plugins.name: powerball-personal
plugins.description: Agentic tools for setting up Claude Code, git workflows, issue resolution, code review, doc searching, and knowledge base management.

plugins.name: writing
plugins.description: Skills for content creation and translation — creative writing, markdown file translation, and general multi-language text translation.

plugins.name: openspec-rewrite
plugins.description: Rewritten OpenSpec workflow skills — setup, explore, propose, implement, verify, sync, and archive changes.

plugins.name: experiment
plugins.description: Sandbox plugin for experimenting with new hooks and skills before promoting them to a stable plugin.

plugins.name: improvement
plugins.description: Skills and hooks for continuous workflow improvement — logs skill usage, distills session workflows into reusable skills, and refines existing skills with new learnings.

plugins.name: powerball-dx
plugins.description: Developer experience toolkit — reusable CI/CD and workflow skills for diagnosing build failures, fixing tests, and maintaining pipelines.
